sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 63

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 63:1
items.html:
(to the question) Twenty-two letters
Otiot [letters] means Kelim [vessels]. And twenty-two letters comprise the whole building of the Partzuf, just as the twenty-two letters of writing comprise all the wisdoms in the world, for by the combinations of the twenty-two letters every wisdom in the world can be expounded. So it is with the Kelim of the Partzuf: those Kelim are capable of receiving and bestowing all their Lights through the Zivugim of the Kelim in them, for the Zivugim in the Sefirot bear resemblance to the combinations of the alphabet. Understand this. (Item 85)
